All right, let's walk through how to set up your Zapier account. Once you're here, you're going to click on the Zapier sign up button right here. So directly link you to Zapier. Once you're here, you're going to go ahead and set up using the email address that you have that you need to set this up with. I'm going to use my much secrets email address. Once you click get started for free, you're going to set up with a password. Please remember this password, so make sure you write it down or save it to your computer. Once you've done that, you're simply going to click sign up. From here, it's going to ask you to choose a role. All you have to do is go down. Business owner entrepreneur is perfectly fine. So you're just going to select this and continue. You can also skip if you would like to, but you can go ahead and select that. And then all you have to do is actually skip these right now because our team will do the initial setup and connect to your Zaps. So all you have to do is skip. And that's it.
